lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਨਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਭਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kamaavan dukh laagai bhaaraa |
lines.english: They practice falsehood, and suffer terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲੇ ਫਿਰਨਿ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoole firan din raatee mar janameh janam gavaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, they wander day and night; through birth and death, they lose their lives. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਖੋਟੀ ਰਾਸਿ ਖੋਟਾ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh khottee raas khottaa paasaaraa |
lines.english: The wealth of the self-willed manmukhs is false, and false is their ostentatious display.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kai sabad adhaaraa |
lines.english: The Shabad of the Perfect Guru is my Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮੈ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib mai at piaaraa |
lines.english: My True Lord and Master is very dear to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧੦॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee dukh sukh sam kar jaananiaa |8|10|11|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who obtains the Greatness of the Naam, looks upon pain and pleasure as one and the same. ||8||10||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀਆ ਖਾਣੀ ਤੇਰੀਆ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: tereea khaanee tereea baanee |
lines.english: The four sources of creation are Yours; the spoken word is Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai sabh bharam bhulaanee |
lines.english: Without the Name, all are deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te har naam paaeaa bin satigur koe na paavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Serving the Guru, the Lord's Name is obtained. Without the True Guru, no one can receive it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree har setee chit laavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who focus their consciousness on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਹਜੇ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har sachaa gur bhagatee paaeeai sahaje man vasaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through devotion to the Guru, the True One is found; He comes to abide in the mind, with intuitive ease. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹੀ ਮਨਸਾ ਕਰਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਤੇਹਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jehee manasaa kar laagai tehaa fal paae |
lines.english: As are the desires one harbors, so are the rewards one receives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਾ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve taa sabh kichh paae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, all things are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਇਕੁ ਨ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man mailaa ik na dhiaae |
lines.english: This mind is filthy and polluted; it does not meditate on the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਵਥੂ ਕਾ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa sabhanaa vathoo kaa poorai bhaag milaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of all things; through perfect destiny, He is met. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਟਿ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਦਿਸੰਤਰਿ ਭਵੈ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ਹੋਰੁ ਵਧੇਰੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tatt teerath disantar bhavai ahankaaree hor vadherai haumai mal laavaniaa |3|
lines.english: The egotists may go on pilgrimages to holy rivers, sacred shrines and foreign lands, but they only gather more of the dirt of egotism. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਲਾਗੀ ਬਹੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antar mail laagee bahu doojai bhaae |
lines.english: Deep within, it is soiled and stained by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat marai har siau chit laae |
lines.english: Those who focus their consciousness on the Lord remain dead while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਾ ਮਲੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve taa mal jaae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, filth and pollution are removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਚੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਚਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har niramal sach mail na laagai sach laagai mail gavaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The True Lord is Pure; no filth sticks to Him. Those who are attached to the True One have their filth washed away. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਅੰਧ ਗੁਬਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: baajh guroo hai andh gubaaraa |
lines.english: Without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧਾ ਅੰਧੁ ਅੰਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: agiaanee andhaa andh andhaaraa |
lines.english: The ignorant ones are blind-there is only utter darkness for them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕੇ ਕੀੜੇ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਪਚਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bisattaa ke keerre bisattaa kamaaveh fir bisattaa maeh pachaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: The maggots in manure do filthy deeds, and in filth they rot and putrefy. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤੇ ਸੇਵੇ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: mukate seve mukataa hovai |
lines.english: Serving the Lord of Liberation, liberation is achieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਖੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mamataa sabade khovai |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad eradicates egotism and possessiveness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਚਾ ਸੇਵੀ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anadin har jeeo sachaa sevee poorai bhaag gur paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: So serve the Dear True Lord, night and day. By perfect good destiny, the Guru is found. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਗਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sachai naam sadaa man sachaa sach seve dukh gavaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: By the True Name, the mind is made true forever. Serving the True Lord, sorrow is driven out. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur te naam nidh paae |
lines.english: From the Perfect Guru, the Treasure of the Naam is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase mel milaae |
lines.english: He Himself forgives and unites in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧੧॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee poore gur te paavaniaa |8|11|12|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Naam, glorious greatness is received. Through the Perfect Guru, the Naam is obtained. ||8||11||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਛਾਣਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee har antar pachhaanahu |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, recognize the Lord deep within your own being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa hajoor door na jaanahu |
lines.english: He is always close at hand-do not think that He is far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਸਾਚੇ ॥
lines.translit: aithai saache su aagai saache |
lines.english: Those who are True here, are True hereafter as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachaa seveh sach kamaaveh sacho sach kamaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: They serve the True One, and practice Truth; they earn Truth, and only Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਾਚੇ ॥
lines.translit: man sachaa sachai sabad raache |
lines.english: That mind is true, which is attuned to the True Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree sachaa naam man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those whose minds are filled with the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sache seveh sach samaaveh sache ke gun gaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They serve the True One, and are absorbed into the True One, singing the Glorious Praises of the True One. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਸਭ ਸੁਧਿ ਗਵਾਈ ਕਰਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਪਛੋਤਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi sabh sudh gavaaee kar avagan pachhotaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: The love of Maya has displaced all their understanding; making mistakes, they live in regret. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਭਰਮਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae maaeaa man bharamaaveh |
lines.english: In love with duality and Maya, their minds wander, unfocused.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜਹਿ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: panddit parreh saad na paaveh |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars read, but they do not taste the essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਤਤੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai taa tat paae |
lines.english: But if they should meet the True Guru, then they obtain the essence of reality;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam man vasaae |
lines.english: the Name of the Lord comes to dwell in their minds.
